name: Honey Golden Chicken- Sabra Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken pieces with lemon.
2. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon ginger and salt.
3. Combine oil, honey, and remaining ginger in a bowl.
4. Brush the chicken with this mixture.
5. Roast the chicken in a moderate oven (350 degrees F) for 1-1/2 to 2 hours, basting occasionally with honey mixture.
